assessments.name: Finance Officer Screening
assessments.description: Finance operations assessment covering reconciliation, reporting, and document control.

assessments.name: HR Operations Screening
assessments.description: HR assessment covering employee records, scheduling, communication, and onboarding judgment.

assessments.name: Admin Coordination Screening
assessments.description: Administration assessment covering office coordination, follow-up discipline, and scenario handling.

assessments.name: Communication And Documentation Screening
assessments.description: Cross-functional assessment for writing clarity, record accuracy, and structured responses.

assessments.name: Operations Judgment Screening
assessments.description: Scenario-based assessment for practical judgment, prioritization, and workplace decision making.

jobs.title: Finance Officer
jobs.summary: Support financial reporting, reconciliations, payment documentation, and audit-ready records.

jobs.title: Assistant HR Officer
jobs.summary: Assist with employee records, onboarding coordination, interview scheduling, and HR documentation.

jobs.title: Admin Officer
jobs.summary: Manage office coordination, vendor follow-ups, facility requests, and administrative reporting.

jobs.title: Operations Assistant
jobs.summary: Support daily task tracking, internal updates, operational records, and issue escalation.

jobs.title: Documentation Coordinator
jobs.summary: Maintain structured documents, follow up on missing records, and prepare clean status summaries.
